_meta.task: audit 2100-4.4 / 2257-4.2 claim-evidence matrix for the current AAAI draft
_meta.scope: abstract (sections/abstract.tex + inline copy in p2_omniselect_aaai.tex), intro numeric/contribution claims, method claim paragraphs, tab:main + tab:external + tab:supp + text-arm paragraph in experiments.tex, conclusion
_meta.binding_syntax: relative/path.json#/json/pointer ; ops: {op:mean_seeds,path} averages per-seed values, {op:sub,a,b} is a-b
_meta.number_match_rule: PASS if bound value matches claimed string exactly after %.nf formatting, or Decimal ROUND_HALF_UP to claim precision, or |diff|<5e-4; string bindings: claim must be substring
_meta.note: matrix documents; it never edits tex. Unbindable claims listed under 'unbound'.

entries.quote: 控制器在过程工业时序上严格最优
在图像、过程故障诊断与表格上处于最优梯队或与最强对照在种子噪声内并列
在 ETTh1 上居第二且明显优于随机
在主裁决任务上从不最差
the controller is strictly best on the DaISy process-industry time series
stays in the top tier or within seed noise of the strongest comparator
ranks second on ETTh1 while clearly outperforming random
published-rule transfers tie random under fine-tuning and the full-token reference is best

entries.quote: Authenticity-only reaches $0.426$ top-1 accuracy on CIFAR-100 but only $0.843$ ROC AUC on OpenML electricity
Authenticity is strongest on CIFAR-100
authenticity reaches $0.426$ on CIFAR-100 but falls below random on CIFAR-10
The controller is strictly best on DaISy
ranks second on ETTh1 while clearly outperforming random. It is never worst on the primary adjudication tasks
Authenticity-only reaches $0.426$ on CIFAR-100
pure authenticity is clearly best at 0.426, while fixed-weight fusion collapses to 0.340

Dynamic fusion DMF & 0.422 & 0.995 & 0.409 & 0.851
in the top tier on process diagnosis at 0.408, tying the strongest fusion transfer at 0.409

entries.quote: Over three seeds the controller leads at 0.380, followed by dynamic fusion at 0.376
It reaches $0.424$ top-1 accuracy on images and $0.873$ ROC AUC on tables
ties the strongest fusion transfer within seed noise at $0.408$ macro-F1
strictly best on the DaISy CSTR task at $1.013$ MASE
On ETTh1 it ranks second at $0.981$, clearly ahead of random
published-rule transfers tying random and the full-token reference remaining best
the controller's margin over the best single policy approaches zero

unbound.quote: on CIFAR-10 it reaches $0.888$, below random at $0.913$, while coverage reaches $0.921$
unbound.reason: CIFAR-10 within-modality flip arm: no CIFAR-10 view exists in canonical_tables.json, results_matrix.json, extended_view_source_ledger.json, text_controls_stats.json, or results_canonical/**/results.json; the numbers predate the paired batch and their per-seed source is not among the mandated evidence files

unbound.quote: falls below random on CIFAR-10 ($0.888$ versus $0.913$), where coverage reaches $0.921$
unbound.reason: same CIFAR-10 arm as intro-within-flip-cifar10; no binding available in the mandated evidence files

unbound.quote: but only $0.888$ on CIFAR-10, below random at $0.913$, while coverage reaches $0.921$
unbound.reason: same CIFAR-10 arm; no binding available in the mandated evidence files

unbound.quote: exceed the best detector-driven selection by about 3.6 points on images and about 7 points on process diagnosis
unbound.reason: oracle-ceiling and detector-AUROC numbers come from the method-v2 diagnostic lane (docs/method_v2_diagnostic.md, experiments/methodv2_diag), which is not among the mandated evidence files

registered legacy exception (docs/aaai_numeric_exceptions_register.md item 1): the legacy /cells namespace of canonical_tables.json carries no mmdataselect (fixed-fusion) cells, and no mandated evidence file reproduces this pre-paired snapshot row

registered legacy exception (docs/aaai_numeric_exceptions_register.md item 1): 0.428/0.995/0.417 match no cell in the mandated evidence files (legacy mmds_adapt cells in canonical_tables.json /cells read 0.4315/1.004/0.4146 after the v5 override); the snapshot's exact source (controller_current_canonical_v5 split-protocol lane) is outside the mandated evidence set
split-protocol self-improving-candidate ablation and complementarity measurement (gamma-hat 8.9 percent) come from dedicated ablation lanes (register item 4), not from the mandated evidence files

unbound.quote: full-fidelity evaluations of the fusion grid drop from 42 to 4
unbound.reason: vision-arm successive-halving prescreen evidence lives in the dedicated prescreen ablation lane, not in the mandated evidence files

40.2 percent is the CIFAR-100N dataset statistic from the cited external paper, not a run result; the 0.448 full-data reference has no 'full' method in results_matrix.json#/vision_cifar100n (its source is the raw lane log, not a mandated evidence file)

unbound.quote: growing the image validation set from 200 to 1600 lifts the controller monotonically from 0.423 to 0.434
unbound.reason: outside the mandated matrix scope and covered by register item 4: dedicated ablation lanes (switch margin, validation size, split protocol) are not recorded in the mandated evidence files

outside the mandated matrix scope and covered by register item 4: tab:contam and Proposition-6 numbers come from the dedicated contamination ablation lane (split protocol), intentionally different from the four-arm main protocol; not in the mandated evidence files
